title: Save deleted subitem columns in trash for easy recovery
excerpt: Subitem columns should be saved in trash just like item columns for easy recovery. I had a client delete a critical subitem column which impacted numerous dashboards and had no way to recover it.

posts.author: kelliem (Kellie M)
posts.cookedHtml: Subitem columns should be saved in trash just like item columns for easy recovery. I had a client delete a critical subitem column which impacted numerous dashboards and had no way to recover it.
